entry.title: about me

entry.content:
Mariana Rodrigues

Business development operator writing about crypto and AI adoption in Finance, Banking, and SaaS.

$whoami
I help business teams understand how emerging technologies move from interest to implementation.

$focus
Crypto payments · AI adoption · SaaS implementation · Finance workflows · Competitive positioning
